name: watch
description: >- File sentinel that monitors the working directory for changes and marker comments, then auto-triggers appropriate skills. Poll-based via git diff against the last scan commit. Writes intake items for batch processing and routes marker actions through /do. Use for automatic reactions to file changes; do NOT use for one-off inspection or tasks needing human judgment per file.
author: SethGammon
summary_zh: 它能监控工作目录的文件变动和特定标记，并自动触发相应的批量处理。适合需要根据文件变更自动响应的场景，但不适合单次检查或需人工判断的任务。
